metadata.notes: Italy 2026: IRPEF 23% to 28,000, 33% 28,000-50,000 (reduced from 35% in 2026), 43% above 50,000. Employee INPS 9.19% up to the massimale (122,295) plus 1% above the prima fascia (56,224), deductible. Employee detrazioni (Art. 13 TUIR) create the no-tax area (~8,500). Regional (addizionale regionale) and municipal (addizionale comunale) surtaxes vary by location and are modelled as flat representative rates; choose your region or enter a custom rate. Children under 21 use the Assegno Unico (not payroll); the 950 EUR credit applies to dependent children aged 21-29. Estimate.
